brief_summary: Horizontal milestone timeline with four labeled events: Computex 2026 May 20–24 (IQUNIX EC75 debut, Corsair CLIPPER PRO Mini 60 reveal, Gateron HE ecosystem shown); mid-2026 Gateron Magnetic Lanes volume rollout expected; Q3 2026 first EC75 reviewer units expected; Q4 2026 configurator parity verdict from reviews. The Computex node is coral-accented; subsequent nodes are warm-grey. An arrow on the right indicates the timeline continues.
